technologies.name: Datadog
technologies.evidence: Crest Data implemented its CyberArk PAM integration along with specialized Datadog dashboard development services to provide a centralized observability layer on top of the customer’s privileged access environment.
technologies.reasoning: Datadog is explicitly mentioned as the observability platform used to provide a centralized view of the customer's privileged access environment.

technologies.name: CyberArk
technologies.evidence: The customer had CyberArk PAM deployed, but needed better visibility into how privileged assets were actually used.
technologies.reasoning: CyberArk is explicitly mentioned as the privileged access management system used by the customer.

technologies.name: Privileged Session Manager (PSM)
technologies.evidence: The customer wanted better visibility into Privileged Session Manager events.
technologies.reasoning: PSM is explicitly mentioned as a component of the customer's privileged access environment.
